narrative: Iran broadening its threats to energy infrastructure drives a geopolitical risk premium, lifting WTI crude +2.47% to $86.4 and keeping markets on edge; gold rises +1.41% to $4,134, equities slip -0.14%, DXY consolidates -0.05%, and VIX holds at 16.6. USD/JPY trades at 163.09 as the +275bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage sustains the pair's bid despite rising geopolitical risk. EUR/USD consolidates at 1.1410 as the +275bp Fed-ECB carry spread anchors the pair. Watch the ECB rate decision tomorrow at 12:15 UTC.
